description_long: This is a freestanding festive photo banner featuring a printed winter holiday scene with a snow-covered Christmas tree, a figure dressed as Ded Moroz (Russian Santa Claus), and a Snow Maiden. The banner has two circular cutouts at head height, allowing people to stand behind and place their faces through for photos. The background is a blue sky with snowflakes, enhancing the winter theme. The banner is supported by a black metal frame with two vertical legs and a horizontal stabilizer. The reverse side is plain, showing only the cutouts and the supporting frame.
description: Freestanding festive photo banner with winter holiday scene, two face cutouts, and a black metal frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the printed holiday scene, two face cutouts, and the Christmas tree.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the banner and the supporting metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the banner, the two face cutouts, and the frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and frame.
attribute_banner_content: holiday scene with Christmas tree and characters, two face cutouts
